title: A Baller
description: Wordle style footballer guessing mobile app.
longDescription: A Baller is a mobile game inspired by Wordle, but focused entirely on football. Players are given visual and statistical clues to guess a mystery footballer each day. Built with React Native and Expo for cross-platform support, it uses Zustand for lightweight state management. The game features daily challenges, a streak system, and a growing database of players from top leagues around the world. Published on Google Play Store.

title: GameTrans
longDescription: GameTrans is a desktop tool that captures on-screen text from any game in real time and translates it instantly using the DeepL API. It leverages EasyOCR with CUDA acceleration to process frames at high speed, and a smart cache system avoids re-translating repeated strings, keeping latency minimal. Designed for players who want to enjoy foreign-language games without switching windows.

title: Admin Dashboard
description: Real-time admin panel for an industrial labeling robot.
longDescription: A full-stack real-time admin dashboard built during my internship at Labenko Bilişim for an industrial blood collection tube labeling robot. The frontend (Node.js + Pug + Socket.io) provides live monitoring and control of the robot's axes, sensors, doors, and power states. The backend server handles REST API endpoints, real-time Socket.io communication, and a simulation server for testing robot operations without physical hardware.

title: CVault
description: A resume management platform with admin control panel.
longDescription: CVault is a full-stack resume management web application built during my internship at Labenko Bilişim. Users can register, log in, upload their CVs, and manage their profiles. Administrators have a dedicated dashboard to view all users, download resumes, monitor active sessions, and manage accounts. Built with Node.js, Express, MongoDB, and Pug templating, with secure password hashing and real-time session tracking via Socket.io.

title: CoordTrack
description: Real-time 3D coordinate tracking and visualization interface.
longDescription: CoordTrack is a real-time simulation and visualization tool that tracks dot movement across a 3D coordinate plane. Built during my internship at Labenko Bilişim to simulate and observe the robot's axis movements. The interface uses Chart.js for live data visualization and Socket.io for real-time updates without page refresh. Users can observe movement trajectories and success/failure states for each coordinate transition.

title: Mysterious Glove
description: Third-person survival game against bots built with Unreal Engine 5.
longDescription: Mysterious Glove is a third-person survival game built in Unreal Engine 5. The player controls a glove-based character with unique abilities — including dash, blackhole, projectile attack, and damage reflection — while fending off AI bots. Bot behavior is driven by custom C++ Behavior Trees with Roam, Chase, Attack, and Flee/Heal states. Environmental Query System (EQS) handles dynamic spawn locations for bots and powerups. The game also features a full save system to persist character and world state between sessions.
features: Behavior Tree AI (Roam, Chase, Attack, Flee)
Save game system for persistent state

title: Cinesatchel
description: A Netflix-inspired TV series and movie discovery website.
longDescription: Cinesatchel is a Netflix-inspired web app for discovering and browsing movies and TV series. Built with React and SASS, it fetches data from a public movie API to display trending content, detailed show pages, and category-based browsing. Focused on replicating a polished streaming-platform UI with smooth transitions and responsive design. Deployed on Vercel.

title: MekanBul
longDescription: MekanBul is a venue discovery platform that helps users find places to visit — cafes, restaurants, and social spots — based on their current location or a searched area. Built with JavaScript and Pug templating and hosted on Replit, it provides a clean interface for filtering and exploring local venues with a focus on simplicity and fast load times.
